title: cyclosorus pseudostenobasis
intro: Cyclosorus pseudostenobasis is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus pseudostenobasis are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the leaves in water to create a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments.
